untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise quantification of: (1) retracement percentage threshold (THRESHOLD_NEEDED), (2) ATR multiples for stop loss and profit target (THRESHOLD_NEEDED), (3) minimum confirmation bars (THRESHOLD_NEEDED), and (4) parabolic/extended move detection which requires multi-bar momentum analysis not available in allowed indicators. The entry condition 'Price completes a parabolic or extended move' requires pattern recognition beyond the scope of individual indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: Partial translation provided using available indicators: Entry triggered by price closing beyond prior swing high/low (close vs prev_high/prev_low) with volume confirmation (hvol_20). Exit based on reversal close (author silent on specific thresholds). Core parameters (retracement %, ATR multiples, confirmation bars) cannot be translated without additional specification. Recommend: specify retracement_range (e.g., 38-50%), stop_loss_atr_multiple (e.g., 2), profit_target_atr_multiple (e.g., 2-3), and min_bars_confirmation (e.g., 2-3 bars).
